fields.summary: Implement user authentication flow with OAuth 2.0
fields.description:
As a user, I want to log in via OAuth 2.0 so that my credentials are managed securely.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* Given the login page, when I click "Sign in with Google", then I am redirected to the OAuth consent screen.
* Given valid OAuth credentials, when the callback is received, then a session token is created.

h3. Technical Notes
* Use PKCE flow for public clients
* Store refresh tokens encrypted in secure storage
